GAIN.want: Gain 5-15 yards of distance they thought was lost to aging
Gain confidence that their ball choice is objectively right
GAIN.prospect_language: I changed based on clubhead speed... saw immediate results

GAIN.want: Gain savings of $20-25/dozen vs. premium balls

BE.want: Be the smart golfer who plays the right ball — not the most expensive one
BE.prospect_language: I have really nice golf equipment without paying those ridiculous prices

BE.want: Be competitive with playing partners despite aging
BE.prospect_language: Every now and then, I'll play a round that reminds me of the old days

DO.want: Stop guessing about ball choice and commit to one ball
DO.prospect_language: I buy 10 dozen logo balls in March every year and play them all season

DO.want: Play one ball for every shot — no 'water ball' needed
DO.prospect_language: Par 5, no water, no OB... PROV1. Par 3 over water... Kirkland

SAVE.prospect_language: Nearly the same performance, half the price

SAVE.want: Save time spent testing different balls each season

AVOID.want: Avoid feeling like a sucker paying $55/dozen
AVOID.prospect_language: For 95% of golfers, prov1s are an insane purchase

AVOID.want: Avoid the shame of being told 'you're not good enough' for a ball
AVOID.prospect_language: Stop wasting your money. You're not good enough.

AVOID.want: Avoid the anxiety of losing a $5 ball in the water
AVOID.prospect_language: I don't feel nearly as bad when I dump one in the water

GAIN.prospect_language: I hit the longest drive I've ever hit on this hole

BE.emotion: Pride in making a data-driven decision
BE.prospect_language: I changed based on clubhead speed

DO.prospect_language: Got my hands on a sleeve and fell in love

SAVE.emotion: Satisfaction of beating the pricing game

AVOID.emotion: Fear of becoming the golfer who has to quit
AVOID.prospect_language: Had to give up golf completely and it was devastating
The entire golf ball industry is a scam

GAIN.belief: The right ball CAN recover some lost distance

DO.belief: Trial and error is the only way to find the right ball

SAVE.belief: DTC/value balls are close to premium but not quite there

AVOID.belief: Distance loss is 100% caused by aging — ball can't help
